title: Senior / Internal Audit Executive (Regional) - Shipping MNC #HHL
description:
• Habourfront

• Working Hours: Mon–Fri, 8.30am – 5.00pm

• Salary: Up to SGD 5,000

Responsibilities

  • Lead internal audit engagements for Group entities across Southeast Asia, West Asia, and Oceania to evaluate financial and operational controls
  • Develop and support audit planning and risk assessment processes to identify key areas of focus and potential risks
  • Analyze audit data to uncover trends, anomalies, and control weaknesses that impact business performance
  • Execute audit fieldwork by testing controls and documenting findings to ensure accuracy and compliance
  • Draft clear, actionable audit reports that communicate findings and recommendations to stakeholders
  • Present audit results to management and collaborate on remediation plans to address identified issues
  • Support internal control reviews and SOX compliance tasks to strengthen governance frameworks
  • Manage multiple audit assignments efficiently while maintaining attention to detail and organizational standards
  • Coordinate regional travel commitments (1–2 weeks per month) to perform on-site audits and stakeholder engagement

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Min. Degree in Accounting or related discipline
  • Min. 3–5 years of experience in internal or external audit or accounting, preferably within MNC
  • Experience in the shipping or logistics industry is an advantage
  • Strong analytical skills applied to audit data interpretation and risk evaluation
  • Proficient report-writing skills to produce comprehensive and understandable audit documentation
  • Effective communication skills to present complex audit findings clearly to diverse audiences
  • Detail-oriented and well-organized to manage multiple priorities and deadlines

If interested, please email me at alexgoh@recruitexpress.com.sg or telegram @alexgohhl

Alex Goh Hock Leong (CEI.No: R1763413 | Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Life Science) | 99C4599)

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
